title: pimelea pendens
intro: Pimelea pendens, also known as 'Swamp Rice Flower', is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea pendens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Pimelea pendens is often made into a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
